name: AWP | 响尾蛇
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been painted with a snakeskin patterned hydrographic. I know you don't believe in the cause...and when I expose you, Valeria will have your head - The Shield and The Serpent Part 1
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 这把武器使用蛇皮图案的花纹进行了涂装。 我知道你不相信这理由… 当我揭露你时，瓦莱里娅将取你首级 -《盾与蛇（上）》
